task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py` so admin identity injection is driven by `_ADMIN_IDENTITY_INJECTED_TOOLS`, added `initiate_batch_payment` to `_CHANNEL_POSTING_TOOLS`, and expanded `SYSTEM_PROMPT` with the six new payment/wallet tools plus the soft `State questions -> query first` guidance. Verified the admin tool classification still holds and the new prompt/agent constants behave as expected with `python -m py_compile src/features/admin_chat/agent.py src/features/admin_chat/tools.py tests/test_social_route_tools.py` and `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_social_route_tools.py -x`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed all six new payment/wallet tools are present in `ADMIN_ONLY_TOOLS` with the module-level exhaustiveness assert still passing, and `agent.py` now defines `_ADMIN_IDENTITY_INJECTED_TOOLS` as `{initiate_payment, initiate_batch_payment, upsert_wallet_for_user, resolve_admin_intent}` while also treating `initiate_batch_payment` as a channel-posting tool.
